category_sources: Official NASA HEASARC FITSIO page describes CFITSIO as a C and Fortran subroutine library for reading and writing FITS data files: https://heasarc.gsfc.nasa.gov/docs/software/fitsio/
source_facts.description says CFITSIO provides C access to FITS data files.
display_name_sources: Official NASA HEASARC page title and user reference guide use CFITSIO: https://heasarc.gsfc.nasa.gov/docs/software/fitsio/
docs_sources: Official CFITSIO User's Reference Guide is hosted by NASA HEASARC: https://heasarc.gsfc.nasa.gov/fitsio/c/c_user/cfitsio.html
Official NASA HEASARC FITSIO home page links downloads and documentation: https://heasarc.gsfc.nasa.gov/docs/software/fitsio/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty and the official NASA HEASARC project surfaces source tarballs, not an official source-control repository: source_facts.source-archive and https://heasarc.gsfc.nasa.gov/docs/software/fitsio/
tags_sources: Official NASA HEASARC page describes CFITSIO as a library for reading and writing FITS data files: https://heasarc.gsfc.nasa.gov/docs/software/fitsio/
source_facts.description says C access to FITS data files with optional Fortran wrappers.
